word: G3557 - νοσφίζομαι - nosphízomai - nos-fid'-zom-ahee - Keep back

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to set apart, to separate, to divide
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from νοσφί nosphi (apart or clandestinely); to sequestrate for oneself, that is, embezzle: - keep back, purloin.
